task_completion.description: Create a new clinical evaluation for the patient John Zenon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GNU Health interface showing a clinical evaluation record open with 'John Zenon' selected as the patient.

task_completion.description: Record the patient's heart rate and oxygen saturation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vitals or clinical measurements section showing a heart rate of approximately 110 bpm (must be >= 100) and oxygen saturation of approximately 93% (must be <= 95).

task_completion.description: Add an active diagnosis for the toxic effect of carbon monoxide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Diagnosis or conditions tab showing an entry starting with ICD-10 code 'T59' (e.g., T59 or T59.1) for toxic effect of carbon monoxide.

task_completion.description: Order at least two baseline lab tests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lab tests or investigations section showing at least two distinct lab test orders created for the patient.

task_completion.description: Prescribe at least one medication for symptom management.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Prescriptions or medications tab showing at least one medication added to the patient's evaluation.

task_completion.description: Schedule a follow-up appointment for 1 to 7 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Appointments section or calendar showing a newly scheduled appointment for John Zenon with a date that is 1 to 7 days after the current system date.

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health GUI to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GNU Health desktop client interface, not a terminal window executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the appropriate application tabs and forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show various tabs (e.g., Vitals, Diagnosis, Prescriptions, Lab) being opened and filled out within the GNU Health application.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the requirements into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into the actual GNU Health form fields, not written in a text editor like gedit, nano, or a markdown file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: John Zenon. Vitals: Heart Rate must be >= 100 bpm, Oxygen Saturation must be <= 95%. Diagnosis: Must start with ICD-10 prefix 'T59'. Lab Orders: At least 2 new lab tests must be ordered. Prescriptions: At least 1 medication must be prescribed. Follow-up: An appointment must be scheduled between 1 and 7 days from the task start date.
